name: yusufkaracaburun
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace by yusufkaracaburun — catalog of skill/plugin bundles for the agile lifecycle and beyond.

plugins.name: ai-kit
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic agile lifecycle for Claude Code + Cursor — 20 skills (aikit-setup, aikit-ship, aikit-tdd, aikit-retro, …), 3 subagents (aikit-explore, aikit-reviewer, aikit-qa-runner), 5 slash commands (/aikit-doctor, /aikit-which, /aikit-status, /aikit-no-globals, /aikit-upgrade), and a PostToolUse skill-logging hook (opt-in).
